ModMetaData.author: karbonpanzer
ModMetaData.name: Vesperia - The Ringer Faction
ModMetaData.description:
Adds the Ringers, settlers and outcasts from a ring city on a distant world.
Includes new weapons, armor, a research tree, traders, and a starting scenario. Spacer-tech outlanders built for enclosed environments who brought everything they needed with them.
